description.en: The Ducklings class is led by two educators and offers a positive, safe, and enriched environment where toddlers learn through stories, songs, finger plays, and exploration through play.
description.fr: La classe des Canetons est dirigee par deux educatrices et offre un environnement positif, securitaire et stimulant ou les tout-petits apprennent par les histoires, les chansons, les jeux de doigts et l'exploration par le jeu.

en.title: Goals and Objectives
bullets: Provide a safe and nurturing environment.
Support children when they express needs and emotions.
Encourage social development through play and activities.
Introduce French and English vocabulary throughout the day.
Stay available to parents for questions and concerns.

en.title: Our Program
en.text: The program offers opportunities for children to grow in every developmental domain.
bullets: Social emotional: play with others and develop empathy.
Self-help: dressing, undressing, eating, and toileting.
Fine motor: puzzles, lacing, play dough, and hand control.
Gross motor: climbing, running, jumping, and stairs.
Cognitive: following instructions and problem solving.
Language: basic English and French words and early phonemic awareness.

fr.title: Objectifs
bullets: Offrir un environnement securitaire et bienveillant.
Soutenir l'expression des besoins et des emotions.
Favoriser le developpement social par le jeu.
Introduire le vocabulaire francais et anglais chaque jour.
Rester disponibles pour les questions des parents.

fr.title: Programme
fr.text: Le programme offre des occasions d'apprentissage dans tous les domaines du developpement.
bullets: Socio-emotionnel: jouer avec les autres et developper l'empathie.
Autonomie: s'habiller, manger et aller aux toilettes.
Motricite fine: casse-tetes, lacage, pate a modeler.
Motricite globale: grimper, courir, sauter, monter les escaliers.
Cognitif: suivre des consignes et resoudre de petits problemes.
Langage: vocabulaire de base en anglais et en francais.

age.fr: 2 ans et 2 mois a 2 ans et 8 mois

description.en: The Busy Bees class serves two-year-olds with two qualified educators in a warm, safe, and stimulating setting focused on exploration, social interaction, and growing independence.
description.fr: La classe des Abeilles accueille les enfants de deux ans avec deux educatrices qualifiees dans un milieu chaleureux, securitaire et stimulant axe sur l'exploration, les interactions sociales et l'autonomie.

en.title: The Two's Schedule
bullets: Morning and afternoon circle time with songs, stories, games, and themes.
Free play in theme-related learning centers.
Daily routines including toileting, snack, and classroom transitions.
Lunch and nap time for rest and nourishment.
Outdoor play twice a day for gross motor development.

en.title: Main Goals
en.text: Provide a warm and stimulating learning environment and help children develop language, listening, sharing, and cooperative skills through play.

en.title: Goals and Objectives
bullets: Physical: large and small motor skills, hand-eye coordination.
Social: independence, self-esteem, and positive peer interaction.
Emotional: identify and express feelings and feel secure in daycare.
Self-help: routines, dressing, toileting, and eating autonomy.
Cognitive and language: shapes, colors, books, speech, creativity through music, art, and dramatic play.

en.title: Educator Goals
bullets: Provide a safe, secure, and interesting environment.
Build comfort and confidence away from home.
Offer tools for each child to excel at their own pace.
Encourage participation in age-appropriate experiences.
Promote self-help through positive modelling and repetition.

fr.title: Horaire du groupe des deux ans
bullets: Cercle du matin et de l'apres-midi avec chansons, histoires, jeux et themes.
Jeu libre dans des centres d'apprentissage thematiques.
Routines quotidiennes: toilette, collation, transitions.
Diner et sieste pour nourrir et reposer l'enfant.
Jeu exterieur deux fois par jour pour la motricite globale.

fr.title: Objectif principal
fr.text: Offrir un milieu chaleureux et stimulant et soutenir le developpement du langage, de l'ecoute, du partage et de la cooperation par le jeu.

fr.title: Objectifs de developpement
bullets: Physique: motricite globale et fine, coordination oeil-main.
Social: autonomie, estime de soi, interactions positives.
Emotionnel: identifier et exprimer les emotions, se sentir en securite.
Autonomie: routines, habillement, toilette, repas.
Cognitif et langage: formes, couleurs, livres, expression, creativite.

age.fr: 2 ans et 9 mois a 3 ans et 3 mois

description.en: The Ladybugs class provides a secure, inviting, stimulating, and fun environment where children build independence and self-esteem at their own pace.
description.fr: La classe des Coccinelles offre un environnement securitaire, accueillant, stimulant et amusant ou les enfants developpent leur autonomie et leur estime de soi a leur rythme.

en.title: Goals and Objectives
bullets: Develop self-help skills: toileting, dressing, eating, sleeping.
Promote social skills: sharing, turn-taking, listening, respect.
Expand language skills: vocabulary, articulation, self-expression.
Develop fine and gross motor skills.

en.title: Our Program
en.text: Children are exposed to varied activities through free play, morning circle in English, and afternoon circle in French.
bullets: French introduced through songs, stories, circle time, and daily routines.
Vocabulary includes numbers, alphabet, days, body parts, and colors.
Learning centers include drama, science, language, writing, and fine motor.
Activities stimulate curiosity, imagination, creativity, language, socialization, and problem solving.

en.title: Minipally / Brindami
en.text: Starting in mid-September, the class participates every two weeks in workshops supporting social-emotional development, self-esteem, and self-control.

fr.title: Objectifs
bullets: Developper l'autonomie: toilette, habillement, repas, sommeil.
Favoriser les habiletes sociales: partage, tour de role, ecoute, respect.
Enrichir le langage: vocabulaire, articulation, expression.
Developper la motricite fine et globale.

fr.title: Programme
fr.text: Les enfants participent a des activites variees en jeu libre, cercle du matin en anglais et cercle de l'apres-midi en francais.
bullets: Le francais est introduit par les chansons, histoires, routines et activites quotidiennes.
Vocabulaire travaille: nombres, alphabet, jours, parties du corps, couleurs.
Centres d'apprentissage: dramatique, science, langage, ecriture, motricite fine.
Les activites stimulent curiosite, imagination, creativite, langage et resolution de problemes.

age.fr: 3 ans et 4 mois a 3 ans et 10 mois

description.en: The Teddy Bears class is led by two educators and focuses on developing the whole child through a bilingual, structured, and play-rich program.
description.fr: La classe des Oursons est dirigee par deux educatrices et mise sur le developpement global de l'enfant grace a un programme bilingue, structure et riche en jeu.

en.title: Welcome Notes for Families
bullets: Encourage children to dress independently (indoor and outdoor clothing).
Use Velcro shoes when possible.
Bring a small pillow and blanket for rest time.
During circle time, please wait for an educator to assist transitions.

en.title: Goals and Objectives
bullets: Make school experience positive and confidence-building.
Stimulate curiosity, understanding, and thought processes.
Encourage sharing, cooperation, and self-expression.
Support independence, safety, and creative development.
Maintain frequent communication with parents.

en.title: Our Program
en.text: A bilingual structured program that nurtures cognitive, emotional, social, fine-motor, and gross-motor development, with meaningful free play and guided play.
bullets: Intellectual development: problem solving, communication, concept discovery.
Social development: cooperation, negotiation, group participation.
Physical development: cutting, drawing, dressing, movement and dance.
Emotional and creative development: choice, risk-taking, expression, and creation.

en.title: Guidelines
bullets: French immersion through songs, instructions, and theme-based vocabulary.
Circle time introduces new vocabulary and collective learning.
Consistent routines support security and school readiness.
Free play supports functional, constructive, and dramatic play.

en.title: Minipally / Brindami
en.text: Starting in mid-September, workshops are offered every two weeks to support social-emotional growth, self-esteem, and self-control.

fr.title: Accueil et informations aux familles
bullets: Encourager l'enfant a s'habiller seul a l'interieur et a l'exterieur.
Privilegier des chaussures a velcro.
Apporter une petite couverture et un petit oreiller pour le repos.
Pendant le cercle, attendre l'aide d'une educatrice pour les transitions.

fr.title: Objectifs
bullets: Rendre l'experience prescolaire positive et valorisante.
Stimuler curiosite, comprehension et reflexion.
Encourager partage, cooperation et expression de soi.
Soutenir autonomie, securite et creativite.
Maintenir une communication frequente avec les parents.

fr.title: Programme
fr.text: Programme bilingue structure qui favorise le developpement cognitif, emotionnel, social, moteur fin et global, avec jeu libre et jeu guide.
bullets: Intellectuel: resoudre des problemes et communiquer.
Social: cooperer, negocier, participer en groupe.
Physique: dessiner, decouper, s'habiller, bouger.
Emotionnel et creatif: faire des choix, s'exprimer, creer.

age.fr: 3 ans et 11 mois a 4 ans et 4 mois

description.en: The Butterflies class is led by three educators and helps children prepare for kindergarten through bilingual learning, social-emotional growth, and structured thematic activities.
description.fr: La classe des Papillons est dirigee par trois educatrices et prepare les enfants a la maternelle grace a des apprentissages bilingues, socio-emotionnels et des activites thematiques structurees.

en.title: Welcome
en.text: September can be exciting and challenging. The team works with families to make each day positive and to support school readiness.
bullets: Complete and return forms quickly.
Prioritize hearing and vision checkups.
Support fine motor skills at home (playdough, cutting, coloring).
Teach hygiene routines and keep communication open.
Stay involved in your child's learning and trust the teaching team.

en.title: Goals and Objectives
en.text: The French program integrates cognitive, physical, creative, and social-emotional development areas.
bullets: Cognitive: French vocabulary, letters, shapes, colors, numbers 1-20, critical thinking.
Physical: balance, hopping, skipping, climbing, throwing, and coordination.
Creative: art materials, 2D/3D creation, science and math exploration, dramatic play.
Social-emotional: empathy, conflict resolution, turn taking, self-esteem.

en.title: Minipally / Brindami
en.text: Bi-weekly workshops begin in mid-September to strengthen social-emotional development, self-esteem, and self-control.

fr.title: Accueil
fr.text: Le mois de septembre peut etre excitant et parfois exigeant. L'equipe collabore avec les familles pour une adaptation positive et une bonne preparation scolaire.
bullets: Completer et remettre les formulaires rapidement.
Favoriser les verifications de la vue et de l'audition.
Travailler la motricite fine a la maison.
Renforcer l'hygiene et maintenir une bonne communication.
S'impliquer activement dans les apprentissages de l'enfant.

fr.title: Objectifs
fr.text: Le programme de francais integre les volets cognitif, physique, creatif et socio-emotionnel.
bullets: Cognitif: vocabulaire francais, lettres, formes, couleurs, nombres, reflexion.
Physique: equilibre, saut, coordination, grimper, lancer.
Creatif: arts, creations 2D/3D, exploration scientifique et mathematique.
Socio-emotionnel: empathie, gestion des conflits, tour de role, estime de soi.

age.fr: 4 ans et 5 mois a 4 ans et 11 mois

description.en: The Penguins class is led by two educators and supports kindergarten readiness through play-oriented learning, bilingual exposure, and social-emotional development.
description.fr: La classe des Pingouins est dirigee par deux educatrices et soutient la preparation a la maternelle par un apprentissage axe sur le jeu, une exposition bilingue et le developpement socio-emotionnel.

en.title: Our Program
en.text: Children learn concepts through circle time, songs, games, stories, and varied learning centers including art, books, science, math, writing, and drama.
bullets: French sounds and vocabulary are introduced gradually.
Children explore and experiment in small groups at their own level.
Learning is play-oriented and theme-based.

en.title: Goals and Objectives
bullets: Promote fine and gross motor development.
Encourage self-help skills and autonomy.
Support prosocial skills, empathy, and respectful interaction.
Develop confidence, self-esteem, and responsibility.
Build problem solving and positive attitudes toward learning.

en.title: Second Step Program
en.text: Second Step helps children prepare for kindergarten by developing learning skills, empathy, emotion management, and friendship/problem-solving skills. Home links are sent for family activities.

fr.title: Programme
fr.text: Les enfants apprennent par le cercle, les chansons, les jeux, les histoires et des centres d'apprentissage varies (art, science, maths, ecriture, dramatique).
bullets: Le vocabulaire et les sons francais sont introduits graduellement.
Les enfants explorent a leur rythme en petits groupes.
L'apprentissage est thematique et base sur le jeu.

fr.title: Objectifs
bullets: Developper la motricite fine et globale.
Encourager l'autonomie et les habiletes de vie quotidienne.
Renforcer les habiletes sociales, l'empathie et le respect.
Developper la confiance en soi et la responsabilite.
Favoriser la resolution de problemes et le gout d'apprendre.
